rows.label: xs32070100_MSG0010
rows.name: Looks like there was a battle here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32070100_MSG0020
rows.name:
There are no bodies other
than Growth soldiers.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32070100_MSG0030
rows.name:
It seems there's still a
chance they are alive.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32070100_MSG0040
rows.name: Yeah.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32070100_MSG0050
rows.name: Let's search.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32070100_MSG0060
rows.name: Who goes there[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32070100_MSG0080
rows.name: You are[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32070100_MSG0090
rows.name: You guys[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32070100_MSG0100
rows.name: I see, you've come looking for your comrades.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32070100_MSG0110
rows.name: Do you know something?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32070100_MSG0120
rows.name: What happened here?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32070100_MSG0130
rows.name: We agreed with your evacuation plan[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32070100_MSG0140
rows.name:
and were escorting our children
to NLA ahead of time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32070100_MSG0150
rows.name: During that time, we passed near here,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32070100_MSG0160
rows.name:
and by coincidence, we found Earthlings
battling the Growth and assisted them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32070100_MSG0170
rows.name:
We were victorious in the battle,
but there were casualties.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32070100_MSG0180
rows.name:
We are currently transporting
the wounded soldiers.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32070100_MSG0190
rows.name: So that's what happened.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32070100_MSG0200
rows.name: You have my gratitude.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32070100_MSG0210
rows.name: There is no need for thanks.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32070100_MSG0220
rows.name:
Your comrades are receiving
treatment at our stronghold.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32070100_MSG0230
rows.name: Ga-Bou-san.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32070100_MSG0240
rows.name: Did you happen to see a Ma-non with them?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32070100_MSG0250
rows.name: We did not see one, but[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32070100_MSG0260
rows.name:
there were other units as well, so
they might have protected them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32070100_MSG0270
rows.name:
If it's no trouble, could we accompany
you to your stronghold now?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32070100_MSG0280
rows.name: Yes, I do not mind.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32070100_MSG0290
rows.name: What are you doing![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32070100_MSG0300
rows.name: To think there were still remnants left.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32070100_MSG0310
rows.name: We'll slaughter all of you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32070100_MSG0320
rows.name: Leave this to us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32070100_MSG0330
rows.name: You hurry and transport the wounded.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32070100_MSG0340
rows.name: [ST:wide ]―Understood.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32070100_MSG0350
rows.name: I leave the rest to you.[ST:wait ]
